hero.composition: Create a wide landscape composition. Place the primary visual interest in the right half or lower-right third and preserve calm, low-detail negative space across the left and upper-left for a title. Make the edges easy to fade into a warm ivory page.

article.composition: Create a landscape editorial illustration with one clear focal idea, a readable silhouette, generous breathing room, and details that remain coherent when displayed at approximately 600 pixels wide.

social.composition: Create a crop-safe landscape preview with a strong central silhouette and meaningful details kept away from the extreme edges. Do not include text; the surrounding page supplies the title.

square.composition: Create a balanced square editorial illustration with a distinct central subject, quiet corners, and enough negative space to tolerate modest cropping.
